utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs (€165/month) and details—meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with costs (€95/month) and details—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with costs (€115/month) and details—meets requirement. 4) additional_services: lists enhancement services with costs (“Included in monthly premiums”)—meets requirement. 5) total_budget: provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—meets requirement. Therefore, all 5/5 items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three insurance selections: LifeFirst Standard Package (Physical & Mental) for health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for property, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel. From the ground-truth ratings, we match by provider and plan names. Health: the closest named option is LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary health physical/mental, which has a rating of 9 (physical) and 4 (mental). However, the final plan combines physical & mental as one LifeFirst Standard Package; the only explicit LifeFirst rating provided for mental health is 4, and for physical health is 9. Property: EliteHome Premium Coverage matches exactly with a rating of 2. Travel: PrimeTravel Premium Plan matches exactly with a rating of 3.
